message.content:
[
  {
    "title": "Eurobarometer: Civil Justice in the European Union",
    "description": "Cross-national survey module on public perceptions and experiences of civil justice systems in EU Member States (access to justice, legal procedures, legal aid). Part of the Eurobarometer series hosted by GESIS.",
    "provider": "GESIS",
    "collection": "Eurobarometer",
    "topics": [
      "LAW, CRIME AND LEGAL SYSTEMS",
      "Crime and law enforcement",
      "International politics and organisations"
    ],
    "population": "Population of the respective nationalities of the European Union Member States, resident in each of the 28 Member States and aged 15 years and over"
  },
  {
    "title": "Eurobarometer: Data Protection and Fundamental Rights",
    "description": "Survey module on attitudes toward personal data protection, privacy, and awareness of fundamental rights frameworks in the EU. Part of the Eurobarometer series hosted by GESIS.",
    "provider": "GESIS",
    "collection": "Eurobarometer",
    "topics": [
      "LAW, CRIME AND LEGAL SYSTEMS",
      "Crime and law enforcement",
      "International politics and organisations"
    ],
    "population": "Population of the respective nationalities of the European Union Member States, resident in each of the 28 Member States and aged 15 years and over"
  },
  {
    "title": "Eurobarometer: Corruption in the European Union",
    "description": "Survey module measuring public perceptions and experiences of corruption across EU Member States, including trust in institutions and effectiveness of anti-corruption measures. Hosted by GESIS within the Eurobarometer series.",
    "provider": "GESIS",
    "collection": "Eurobarometer",
    "topics": [
      "LAW, CRIME AND LEGAL SYSTEMS",
      "Crime and law enforcement",
      "International politics and organisations"
    ],
    "population": "Population of the respective nationalities of the European Union Member States, resident in each of the 28 Member States and aged 15 years and over"
  },
  {
    "title": "Eurobarometer: Organised Crime and Security",
    "description": "Survey module on public perceptions of organised crime, trafficking, and related security issues in the EU. Part of the Eurobarometer series hosted by GESIS.",
    "provider": "GESIS",
    "collection": "Eurobarometer",
    "topics": [
      "LAW, CRIME AND LEGAL SYSTEMS",
      "Crime and law enforcement",
      "International politics and organisations"
    ],
    "population": "Population of the respective nationalities of the European Union Member States, resident in each of the 28 Member States and aged 15 years and over"
  },
  {
    "title": "Eurobarometer: Cybersecurity and Cybercrime",
    "description": "Survey module on experiences with and attitudes toward cybersecurity risks, cybercrime, and law enforcement responses in the digital sphere within the EU. Hosted by GESIS as part of the Eurobarometer series.",
    "provider": "GESIS",
    "collection": "Eurobarometer",
    "topics": [
      "LAW, CRIME AND LEGAL SYSTEMS",
      "Crime and law enforcement",
      "International politics and organisations"
    ],
    "population": "Population of the respective nationalities of the European Union Member States, resident in each of the 28 Member States and aged 15 years and over"
  },
  {
    "title": "Eurobarometer: Public Perceptions of the Justice System",
    "description": "Survey module assessing trust and confidence in judicial systems, courts, and legal authorities across EU Member States. Part of the Eurobarometer series hosted by GESIS.",
    "provider": "GESIS",
    "collection": "Eurobarometer",
    "topics": [
      "LAW, CRIME AND LEGAL SYSTEMS",
      "Crime and law enforcement",
      "International politics and organisations"
    ],
    "population": "Population of the respective nationalities of the European Union Member States, resident in each of the 28 Member States and aged 15 years and over"
  },
  {
    "title": "Eurobarometer: Awareness of the EU Charter of Fundamental Rights",
    "description": "Survey module on public awareness and understanding of the EU Charter of Fundamental Rights and related legal protections. Hosted by GESIS within the Eurobarometer series.",

    "collection": "Eurobarometer",

  {
    "title": "Eurobarometer: International Organisations and the EU’s Role in the World",
    "description": "Survey module on public attitudes toward international organisations (e.g., EU’s external relations, global governance) and international politics. Part of the Eurobarometer series hosted by GESIS.",
